name: terraform-rig-readonly
description: Read-only Terraform state harvest for the prod workspace: state_list (resource addresses) + state_pull (a resource's current state, redacted by the state's own sensitive_attributes). Read-only by construction — both RENDER saved state and launch NO providers (zero code-exec, zero state lock); no plan/apply/destroy/import/console exists on this surface. Out-of-policy calls return isError, not a throw. Phase-4 LocalStack rig; static creds (not JWKS).

tools.name: state_list
tools.description: List resource ADDRESSES in a workspace (read-only, zero-provider).

tools.name: state_pull
tools.description: Pull a resource's current state by address, redacted by the state's own sensitive_attributes (read-only, zero-provider). Never returns secret values or raw state.
